_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of social dynamics of computer attackers in a global context.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model evasion, model extraction, model inversion, membership inference, data poisoning, and prompt injection.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-002 (RM, cosine: 0.454), RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.433).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.494). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [attackers, computer, context, dynamics, global, social] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.900, R=0.846). P exceeds R by 0.054 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (98.9%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of social dynamics of computer attackers in a global context." and "Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.513 ≈ STS 0.494 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [attackers, computer, context, dynamics, global, social]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 98.9% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
